products.name: Radio Frequency (RF) Switch Products
products.descriptor: RF electromechanical switch products for communications, radar, and electronic warfare

evidence.snippet:
### **[Radio Frequency (RF) Switch Products](/engineeredsolutions/RF/Default.aspx)**
Industry-leading Radio Frequency (RF) electromechanical switch products and other RF devices. For communications, radar, electronic warfare, data center, and automated test equipment applications.

Features: 
• SPDT, Multi Position and Transfer Switches
• Frequency range DC to 26.5 GHz
• 1,000,000 cycles
• RF Impedance 50 Ohm and 75 Ohm nominal
• Switching Time 15 mSec max
• Available in Failsafe and Latching
• Compact Size
• RoHS Compliant
• Low Cost and Volume Production
